title: Easy Armor Trim
body:
A DataPack that add a craft for all armor trims and for netherite upgrade

**Commands**
```
/function easytrim:shulker
Get a shulker with all trims


/trigger unistall
A easy option to unistall the DataPack
```


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[_PMC Download_](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/easy-armor-trims/)

</details>
